description_long: This is a humanoid doll with an elongated, bulbous head and a slender, cylindrical body. The surface appears to be made of a coarse, tan fabric, possibly burlap or canvas, with visible stitching and some worn or patched areas, especially on the head. The doll has long, thin arms and legs, each ending in simple, flat extensions that suggest stylized fingers and toes. The face is minimally detailed, with faint, stitched or painted features and some discoloration or damage on one side of the head. The overall appearance is slightly distressed, giving the doll a vintage or handmade look. The proportions and construction suggest it is a soft, lightweight toy, likely stuffed with a pliable material.
description: A slender, humanoid doll with a large, bulbous head and long limbs, made from tan, textured fabric with visible stitching and worn patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, chest, and both arms extended downward, with visible stitching and a patch on the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated head, thin profile, and the seam running down the side of the body and head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and body, with both arms and legs visible and no facial features apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the head's curvature, side seam, and the back of one arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is unclothed, with its body and limbs made entirely from a single piece of tan, textured fabric, featuring visible seams and patches but no separate garments or accessories.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head slightly tilted, arms hanging down and slightly outward, and legs straight and parallel. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with minimal stitched or painted features and no pronounced emotion.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered in the same tan fabric as the body, with some patching and stitching.
